name: Poster Rotator
description: Fill a local poster pool per movie from providers, then periodically rotate the Primary Poster image from the pool. This keeps Jellyfin looking fresh with rotating poster images on an interval of your choosing.

versions.changelog: Compatibility: target Jellyfin 10.12.0.0 prerelease for the 1.7 line. Pool management: adds PluginData pool diagnostics, paginated pool browsing, upload/delete image actions, immediate rotation by media or library, and selective purge. Migration: pool state now uses versioned JSON metadata under PluginData/pools while legacy mapping files are migrated and removed after successful writes. Maintenance: remote poster discovery uses Jellyfin IProviderManager.GetAvailableRemoteImages, CS0618 is blocked as an error, and explicit library scan requests use QueueLibraryScan.

Compatibility: target Jellyfin 10.11.0.0 for the full 10.11.x line. Security: bounded image downloads, safer URL validation, safe purge, and serialized rotation/purge operations. Performance: plugin-data pool storage with migration from media-folder .poster_pool directories and Jellyfin SaveImage rotation.
